pi_items.source: Task description explicitly specifies this directory path for the solution.
Task description specifies version 13.0.3, which is confirmed as a valid Newtonsoft.Json release via nuget.org API.
Task description specifies version 2.1.35, which is confirmed as a valid Dapper release via nuget.org API.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic EcommercePlatform solution located at C:\Users\Docker\source\repos\EcommercePlatform. The expected package versions required to configure Central Package Management are Newtonsoft.Json 13.0.3 and Dapper 2.1.35, both of which are valid standard NuGet releases.
